prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约17587名→18092名→18162名→20947名→15408名，整体呈波动走势。2024年位次大幅后移至20947名，2025年强势回升至15408 名，创近五年最佳录取位次，近两年波动幅度达5540名，显示报考热度存在明显大小年特征；该校在广东省物理类招生计划：2021年73人、2022年73人、2023年 76人、2024年70人、2025年71人；2026年计划缩减至58人（较2025年减少13人，缩招约18.3%），缩招幅度显著，理论上使竞争加剧、录取位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京理工 大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第36名（2025年第38名），排名稳中有升，属全国顶尖211行列，素有"国防七子"之称，在兵器、化工等领域享有 盛誉；2026年声誉评价未出现明显负面舆情，抖音热度排名第65位（评价"一般"），短视频平台曝光量中等；近年无投档线断档记录，学校整体形象稳健。2026 年声誉文件中南京理工大学未列入主要负面事件，报考心理环境平稳；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+，光学工程、控制科学与工程、机械工程获评 A-，4个A类学科在211高校中表现突出。2026年招生专业中电子信息类、计算机类、自动化类、兵器类等均与优势学科高度关联，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业持续高热推荐，与南理工核心工科专业高度匹配，推高报考热度。广东省2026年物理类考生约456000人，较2025年440208 人增加约3.6%，考生规模扩大使竞争略有加剧。省控线方面，广东物理类本科批2021–2025年分别为432→445→439→442→436分，整体平稳，未出现剧烈波动；南京 理工大学位于江苏省南京市，属长三角核心城市，对广东省考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在广东省招生占比适中，非本省高校但区位优势明显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准 位次15408名、2026年大幅缩招约18.3%、广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%以及学校排名稳中有升、优势学科吸引力强等因素，缩招效应与考 生增长效应相互对冲后，预计2026年录取位次较2025年略有前移但幅度有限。预测最低位次约13915名，区间13415–14415名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 17587 → 18092 → 18162 → 20947 → 15408, showing a fluctuating trend. In 2024, the ranking significantly dropped to 20947, but in 2025 it strongly rebounded to 15408, achieving the best admission ranking in the past five years. The fluctuation range in the last two years reached 5540 positions, indicating a clear odd-even year pattern in application popularity. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangdong Province Physics Category: 73 in 2021, 73 in 2022, 76 in 2023, 70 in 2024, 71 in 2025; the 2026 plan is reduced to 58 (a decrease of 13 from 2025, a reduction of about 18.3%). The significant reduction in enrollment theoretically intensifies competition and moves the admission ranking forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 36th (38th in 2025), with a steadily rising ranking, belonging to the top-tier 211 universities. It is known as one of the 'Seven Sons of National Defense' and enjoys high reputation in fields such as weaponry and chemical engineering. In 2026, there was no significant negative public opinion regarding its reputation; its Douyin popularity ranking is 65th (rated as 'average'), with moderate exposure on short video platforms. In recent years, there have been no records of admission cutoff line gaps, and the overall image of the university is stable. In the 2026 reputation document, Nanjing University of Science and Technology was not listed in major negative incidents, and the application psychological environment is stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A+, Optical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering were rated A-, with four A-class disciplines standing out among 211 universities. In the 2026 enrollment majors, Electronic Information, Computer Science, Automation, and Weaponry are highly correlated with advantageous disciplines, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the core engineering disciplines of NJUST, boosting application popularity. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province is approximately 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the Guangdong Physics Category undergraduate batch from 2021 to 2025 were 432 → 445 → 439 → 442 → 436, overall stable without drastic fluctuations. Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal to Guangdong candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Guangdong is moderate; although not a local university, its location advantage is significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15408, the significant enrollment reduction of about 18.3% in 2026, the increase of about 3.6% in Guangdong Physics Category candidates, the steadily rising university ranking, and the strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, the effects of enrollment reduction and candidate growth offset each other. It is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will move slightly forward compared to 2025 but with limited magnitude. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13915, with a range of 13415–14415.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 13915, range 13415–14415. Candidates within the range are advised to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors (Automation, Mechanical, Weaponry, etc., core engineering fields of NJUST), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information Dacheng Class) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Materials, Chemical) as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 13400) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. NJUST has added several experimental classes and innovative talent classes in 2026; it is recommended to prioritize major directions supported by A-class discipline evaluations.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: Nanjing University of Science and Technology began enrolling history category students in Guangdong Province in 2024, with a minimum ranking of approximately 7425 in 2024, rising to about 6493 in 2025, a forward shift of about 932 positions over two years, showing a clear upward trend and increasing application enthusiasm; history category enrollment plan: 7 students in 2024, 8 students in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly expands to 12 students (an increase of 4 students from 2025, a 50% expansion), with a notable expansion rate, theoretically causing the admission ranking to move backward and competition to relatively ease.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Science and Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 36th in the Soft Science ranking, belonging to top-tier 211, but the university is strong in science and engineering, with history category enrollment majors all being language and public administration types, not the university's core advantageous fields; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral, with no negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 65th (rated as 'average'), with overall moderate exposure. The history category enrollment scale is small, with limited impact from the overall university reputation; NJUST's A-class disciplines are all engineering (Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Optical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-), and the history category enrollment majors (Japanese, English, Digital Public Governance, Law) have no directly corresponding A-class discipline support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Guangdong Province is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, with a significant expansion in examinee scale and intensified competition. Regarding provincial control lines, the Guangdong history category undergraduate batch from 2021 to 2025 was 448→437→433→428→464 points respectively, with a clear rise in 2025, reflecting overall tightening competition in the history category; Nanjing is located in the core area of the Yangtze River Delta, with some regional appeal to Guangdong history category examinees, but NJUST's liberal arts major strength is average, not the first choice for history category examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 6493, a significant 50% expansion in 2026, an approximately 11.6% increase in Guangdong history category examinees, and the university's liberal arts majors not being advantageous fields, the expansion effect far exceeds the examinee growth effect, and it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will significantly move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8241, with a range of 7741–8741.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 8241, range 7741–8741. NJUST has few history category enrollment majors (only 4), all being language and public administration types, not the university's advantageous fields. Within the ranking range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Digital Public Governance as the main choice, with Tier 1 Law and English as reach options, and Tier 3 Japanese as a safety. Due to the small number of history category enrollments (12 students), ranking fluctuations may be significant, so it is advisable to combine with other institutions for joint application.
